creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
On 12 September 2012 13:14, Ed Maste <emaste@freebsd.org> wrote:
> I am going to try to get the realpath text clarified.

Ahh, I found http://austingroupbugs.net/view.php?id=324 which
describes exactly this case.

I quote:

Change:

    "A component of the path prefix is not a direcory"
in all of the cases listed in Note: 0000572 to:
    "A component of the path prefix names an existing file that is
neither a directory
     nor a symbolic link to a directory".
with minor variations where the interface uses multiple path arguments.
